We propose the Kemeny Transformer, a novel Transformer-based algorithm trained via reinforcement learning to efficiently approximate the Kemeny optimal ranking. Experimental results demonstrate that our model outperforms classical majority-heuristic and Markov-chain approaches, achieving substantially faster inference than integer linear programming solvers. Our approach thus offers a practical, scalable alternative for real-world ranking-aggregation tasks.

</details>


### [959] [Decomposing Probabilistic Scores: Reliability, Information Loss and Uncertainty](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15232)
*Arthur Charpentier,Agathe Fernandes-Machado*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个校准分解框架，将预测器的期望损失分解为校准误差（可靠性）和条件熵（残差不确定性），并分析了信息层级对校准的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 校准是一个依赖于预测器保留信息的条件属性，现有研究缺乏对信息层级如何影响校准的系统性分析。本文旨在开发一个统一的分解框架，明确展示信息保留与校准之间的关系。

Method: 开发了任意适当损失函数的分解恒等式，将期望损失分解为适当遗憾（可靠性）和条件熵（残差不确定性）项。对于嵌套信息层级，提出了链式分解来量化信息增益。应用于分类问题时，得到三部分分解：误校准、从特征到分数的信息损失项，以及特征层面的不可约不确定性。

Result: 建立了校准与信息保留之间的明确数学关系，提供了Brier损失和对数损失的显式分解形式。该框架可用于分析后验重新校准、校准模型聚合以及分阶段/提升构造。

Conclusion: 校准性能本质上取决于预测器保留的信息量，分解框架为理解和改进校准提供了系统性的数学工具，特别是在信息层级和特征表示方面。

Abstract: Calibration is a conditional property that depends on the information retained by a predictor. We develop decomposition identities for arbitrary proper losses that make this dependence explicit. At any information level $\mathcal A$, the expected loss of an $\mathcal A$-measurable predictor splits into a proper-regret (reliability) term and a conditional entropy (residual uncertainty) term. For nested levels $\mathcal A\subseteq\mathcal B$, a chain decomposition quantifies the information gain from $\mathcal A$ to $\mathcal B$. Applied to classification with features $\boldsymbol{X}$ and score $S=s(\boldsymbol{X})$, this yields a three-term identity: miscalibration, a {\em grouping} term measuring information loss from $\boldsymbol{X}$ to $S$, and irreducible uncertainty at the feature level. We leverage the framework to analyze post-hoc recalibration, aggregation of calibrated models, and stagewise/boosting constructions, with explicit forms for Brier and log-loss.

</details>


### [960] [Evaluating the Robustness of Reinforcement Learning based Adaptive Traffic Signal Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15283)
*Dickens Kwesiga,Angshuman Guin,Khaled Abdelghany,Michael Hunter*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出基于强化学习的自适应交通信号控制算法，支持完整的八相位环栅配置，通过分布式异步训练提高效率，在多种交通需求条件下显著优于传统控制方法


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于强化学习的交通信号控制研究存在三个主要问题：1) 依赖简化的信号时序结构；2) 在不同交通需求条件下的鲁棒性评估不足；3) 在微观交通仿真环境中的训练效率低下。需要开发更实用、鲁棒且高效的RL信号控制算法

Method: 1) 设计支持完整八相位环栅配置的RL信号控制算法；2) 在不同交通流量和OD需求模式下进行训练和评估；3) 实现分布式异步训练架构，支持多计算节点并行仿真；4) 与最先进的感应式信号控制(ASC)进行基准比较

Result: 1) RL控制显著优于优化后的ASC，各方向平均延误减少11-32%；2) 在单一OD模式上训练的模型对相似未见需求模式泛化良好，但在显著不同条件下性能下降；3) 在多样化OD模式上训练的模型表现出强鲁棒性，即使在高度不同的未见需求场景下也持续优于ASC

Conclusion: 提出的RL信号控制算法在实际部署方面迈出了重要一步，通过支持完整信号配置、评估鲁棒性和提高训练效率，为实际应用奠定了基础。多样化训练数据对模型鲁棒性至关重要

Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has attracted increasing interest for adaptive traffic signal control due to its model-free ability to learn control policies directly from interaction with the traffic environment. However, several challenges remain before RL-based signal control can be considered ready for field deployment. Many existing studies rely on simplified signal timing structures, robustness of trained models under varying traffic demand conditions remains insufficiently evaluated, and runtime efficiency continues to pose challenges when training RL algorithms in traffic microscopic simulation environments. This study formulates an RL-based signal control algorithm capable of representing a full eight-phase ring-barrier configuration consistent with field signal controllers. The algorithm is trained and evaluated under varying traffic demand conditions and benchmarked against state-of-the-practice actuated signal control (ASC). To assess robustness, experiments are conducted across multiple traffic volumes and origin-destination (O-D) demand patterns with varying levels of structural similarity. To improve training efficiency, a distributed asynchronous training architecture is implemented that enables parallel simulation across multiple computing nodes. Results from a case study intersection show that the proposed RL-based signal control significantly outperforms optimized ASC, reducing average delay by 11-32% across movements. A model trained on a single O-D pattern generalizes well to similar unseen demand patterns but degrades under substantially different demand conditions. In contrast, a model trained on diverse O-D patterns demonstrates strong robustness, consistently outperforming ASC even under highly dissimilar unseen demand scenarios.

</details>


### [961] [Enhancing classification accuracy through chaos](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15299)
*Panos Stinis*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出一种利用混沌动力学增强分类准确率的新方法：将数据向量提升到高维空间作为混沌动力系统的初始条件，经过时间演化后输入可训练的softmax分类器


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索如何利用混沌动力系统的特性来提升分类性能，特别是通过将数据嵌入到混沌系统的演化过程中来增强特征表示能力

Method: 1) 将分类数据作为向量提升到高维空间；2) 作为混沌动力系统的初始条件进行规定时间间隔的演化；3) 将演化后的状态输入可训练的softmax分类器；4) 使用随机扰动的正交向量作为概念验证

Result: 相比标准softmax分类器和仅进行高维提升的分类器，混沌增强分类器能显著加速训练过程并提高分类准确率，特别是在2到20维的中等维度向量上表现优异

Conclusion: 混沌动力系统可以作为有效的特征增强机制，通过将数据嵌入到混沌演化过程中，能够改善分类性能并加速训练收敛

Abstract: We propose a novel approach which exploits chaos to enhance classification accuracy. Specifically, the available data that need to be classified are treated as vectors that are first lifted into a higher-dimensional space and then used as initial conditions for the evolution of a chaotic dynamical system for a prescribed temporal interval. The evolved state of the dynamical system is then fed to a trainable softmax classifier which outputs the probabilities of the various classes. As proof-of-concept, we use samples of randomly perturbed orthogonal vectors of moderate dimension (2 to 20), with a corresponding number of classes equal to the vector dimension, and show how our approach can both significantly accelerate the training process and improve the classification accuracy compared to a standard softmax classifier which operates on the original vectors, as well as a softmax classifier which only lifts the vectors to a higher-dimensional space without evolving them. We also provide an explanation for the improved performance of the chaos-enhanced classifier.

</details>


### [962] [A Kolmogorov-Arnold Surrogate Model for Chemical Equilibria: Application to Solid Solutions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15307)
*Leonardo Boledi,Dirk Bosbach,Jenna Poonoosamy*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 该研究将Kolmogorov-Arnold网络应用于地球化学求解器，作为传统多层感知机的替代方案，以加速反应输运模拟。在水泥系统基准测试中，KAN网络将绝对和相对误差分别降低了62%和59%，在放射性核素固溶体溶解度预测中保持中位数误差接近1×10⁻³。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 地球化学求解器的计算成本高昂，特别是在反应输运模拟中，化学计算需要执行数十亿次。现有研究探索了多种机器学习方法作为数据驱动的替代模型，其中多层感知机因能识别非线性关系而被广泛使用。本研究旨在探索新型Kolmogorov-Arnold网络在地球化学模拟中的性能。

Method: 采用Kolmogorov-Arnold网络架构，该网络使用可学习的基于样条的函数替代传统的固定激活函数。首先在现有的水泥系统基准上训练替代模型，然后应用于核废料地质处置的实际案例，即放射性核素固溶体溶解度的确定。研究考虑了从简单机械混合物到非理想固溶体的不同热力学复杂度水平。

Result: 在水泥基准测试中，Kolmogorov-Arnold架构在绝对和相对误差指标上均优于多层感知机，分别减少了62%和59%。在二元和三元镭固溶体模型中，Kolmogorov-Arnold网络保持中位数预测误差接近1×10⁻³。

Conclusion: Kolmogorov-Arnold网络作为地球化学求解器的替代模型表现出优越性能，这是利用替代模型加速反应输运模拟、优化深地质废物储存库安全评估的第一步。

Abstract: The computational cost of geochemical solvers is a challenging matter. For reactive transport simulations, where chemical calculations are performed up to billions of times, it is crucial to reduce the total computational time. Existing publications have explored various machine-learning approaches to determine the most effective data-driven surrogate model. In particular, multilayer perceptrons are widely employed due to their ability to recognize nonlinear relationships. In this work, we focus on the recent Kolmogorov-Arnold networks, where learnable spline-based functions replace classical fixed activation functions. This architecture has achieved higher accuracy with fewer trainable parameters and has become increasingly popular for solving partial differential equations. First, we train a surrogate model based on an existing cement system benchmark. Then, we move to an application case for the geological disposal of nuclear waste, i.e., the determination of radionuclide-bearing solids solubilities. To the best of our knowledge, this work is the first to investigate co-precipitation with radionuclide incorporation using data-driven surrogate models, considering increasing levels of thermodynamic complexity from simple mechanical mixtures to non-ideal solid solutions of binary (Ba,Ra)SO$_4$ and ternary (Sr,Ba,Ra)SO$_4$ systems. On the cement benchmark, we demonstrate that the Kolmogorov-Arnold architecture outperforms multilayer perceptrons in both absolute and relative error metrics, reducing them by 62% and 59%, respectively. On the binary and ternary radium solid solution models, Kolmogorov-Arnold networks maintain median prediction errors near $1\times10^{-3}$. This is the first step toward employing surrogate models to speed up reactive transport simulations and optimize the safety assessment of deep geological waste repositories.

</details>


### [963] [Data Augmentation via Causal-Residual Bootstrapping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15335)
*Mateusz Gajewski,Sophia Xiao,Bijan Mazaheri*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于独立机制原则的数据增强方法，通过置换边际概率分布模型的残差来整合因果知识，超越马尔可夫等价类，在加性噪声设置中提高预测模型的准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数据增强方法主要整合领域知识（如图像变换），但因果知识的整合通常局限于条件独立性等价类。作者希望开发一种能够整合超越马尔可夫等价类因果信息的数据增强方法，特别是在加性噪声设置中。

Method: 基于独立机制原则，通过置换边际概率分布模型的残差来生成增强数据。该方法在加性噪声设置中操作，能够整合超出马尔可夫等价类的因果信息。

Result: 基于增强数据构建的预测模型表现出改进的准确性，在线性高斯设置中提供了理论支持。

Conclusion: 该方法为整合超越马尔可夫等价类的因果知识提供了一种有效的数据增强框架，特别适用于加性噪声设置，能够提高预测模型的性能。

Abstract: Data augmentation integrates domain knowledge into a dataset by making domain-informed modifications to existing data points. For example, image data can be augmented by duplicating images in different tints or orientations, thereby incorporating the knowledge that images may vary in these dimensions. Recent work by Teshima and Sugiyama has explored the integration of causal knowledge (e.g, A causes B causes C) up to conditional independence equivalence. We suggest a related approach for settings with additive noise that can incorporate information beyond a Markov equivalence class. The approach, built on the principle of independent mechanisms, permutes the residuals of models built on marginal probability distributions. Predictive models built on our augmented data demonstrate improved accuracy, for which we provide theoretical backing in linear Gaussian settings.

</details>


### [964] [Conditional Rectified Flow-based End-to-End Rapid Seismic Inversion Method](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15354)
*Haofei Xu,Wei Cheng,Sizhe Li,Jie Xiong*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出基于条件整流流的端到端快速地震反演方法，通过专用地震编码器提取多尺度特征，采用分层注入控制策略实现细粒度条件控制，在OpenFWI基准上取得优异精度，相比扩散方法实现采样加速，相比InversionNet方法精度更高。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统地震反演方法计算成本高且依赖初始模型，现有深度生成模型难以平衡采样效率和反演精度，需要开发能同时解决这两个问题的快速准确反演方法。

Method: 基于条件整流流(Conditional Rectified Flow)的端到端框架，设计专用地震编码器提取多尺度地震特征，采用分层注入控制策略实现细粒度条件控制。

Result: 在OpenFWI基准数据集上取得优异反演精度；相比扩散方法实现采样加速；相比InversionNet方法生成精度更高；在Marmousi真实数据上零样本泛化验证了实用价值。

Conclusion: 该方法能生成高质量初始速度模型，有效缓解传统全波形反演中的初始模型依赖问题，具有工业实用价值，为地震反演提供了高效准确的解决方案。

Abstract: Seismic inversion is a core problem in geophysical exploration, where traditional methods suffer from high computational costs and are susceptible to initial model dependence. In recent years, deep generative model-based seismic inversion methods have achieved remarkable progress, but existing generative models struggle to balance sampling efficiency and inversion accuracy. This paper proposes an end-to-end fast seismic inversion method based on Conditional Rectified Flow[1], which designs a dedicated seismic encoder to extract multi-scale seismic features and adopts a layer-by-layer injection control strategy to achieve fine-grained conditional control. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method achieves excellent inversion accuracy on the OpenFWI[2] benchmark dataset. Compared with Diffusion[3,4] methods, it achieves sampling acceleration; compared with InversionNet[5,6,7] methods, it achieves higher accuracy in generation. Our zero-shot generalization experiments on Marmousi[8,9] real data further verify the practical value of the method. Experimental results show that the proposed method achieves excellent inversion accuracy on the OpenFWI benchmark dataset; compared with Diffusion methods, it achieves sampling acceleration while maintaining higher accuracy than InversionNet methods; experiments based on the Marmousi standard model further verify that this method can generate high-quality initial velocity models in a zero-shot manner, effectively alleviating the initial model dependency problem in traditional Full Waveform Inversion (FWI), and possesses industrial practical value.

</details>


### [965] [FuXiWeather2: Learning accurate atmospheric state estimation for operational global weather forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15358)
*Xiaoze Xu,Xiuyu Sun,Songling Zhu,Xiaohui Zhong,Yuanqing Huang,Zijian Zhu,Jun Liu,Hao Li*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: FuXiWeather2是一个统一的端到端神经框架，用于数据同化和天气预报，通过直接对齐真实观测和再分析数据的训练目标来纠正再分析产品的系统偏差，并在10天预报中超越传统数值天气预报系统。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统数值天气预报受限于数据同化和数值建模的计算瓶颈。现有机器学习模型主要作为"再分析产品的模拟器"，保留了系统偏差和操作延迟。需要开发能够直接纠正再分析产品误差并实现快速响应的端到端框架。

Method: 1) 统一端到端神经框架，直接对齐真实观测和再分析数据的训练目标；2) 引入递归展开训练方法，解决训练期间NWP背景输入与部署期间自生成背景之间的分布偏移；3) 在原始和模拟观测的混合数据集上训练，减轻观测分布不一致的影响。

Result: 1) 在0.25°分辨率下生成全球分析场和10天预报，耗时仅数分钟；2) 分析场在大多数变量上超越NCEP-GFS，在对流层低层和地表变量上优于ERA5和ECMWF-HRES系统；3) 确定性预报在91%的评估指标上超过HRES系统；4) 在台风路径预测中表现优异。

Conclusion: FuXiWeather2通过端到端神经框架有效纠正了再分析产品的系统偏差，实现了快速、高精度的天气分析和预报，在极端天气事件快速响应中具有重要实用价值。

Abstract: Numerical weather prediction has long been constrained by the computational bottlenecks inherent in data assimilation and numerical modeling. While machine learning has accelerated forecasting, existing models largely serve as "emulators of reanalysis products," thereby retaining their systematic biases and operational latencies. Here, we present FuXiWeather2, a unified end-to-end neural framework for assimilation and forecasting. We align training objectives directly with a combination of real-world observations and reanalysis data, enabling the framework to effectively rectify inherent errors within reanalysis products. To address the distribution shift between NWP-derived background inputs during training and self-generated backgrounds during deployment, we introduce a recursive unrolling training method to enhance the precision and stability of analysis generation. Furthermore, our model is trained on a hybrid dataset of raw and simulated observations to mitigate the impact of observational distribution inconsistency. FuXiWeather2 generates high-resolution ($0.25^{\circ}$) global analysis fields and 10-day forecasts within minutes. The analysis fields surpass the NCEP-GFS across most variables and demonstrate superior accuracy over both ERA5 and the ECMWF-HRES system in lower-tropospheric and surface variables. These high-quality analysis fields drive deterministic forecasts that exceed the skill of the HRES system in 91\% of evaluated metrics. Additionally, its outstanding performance in typhoon track prediction underscores its practical value for rapid response to extreme weather events. The FuXiWeather2 analysis dataset is available at https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18872728.

</details>


### [966] [Deep learning and the rate of approximation by flows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15363)
*Jingpu Cheng,Qianxiao Li,Ting Lin,Zuowei Shen*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 该论文将深度残差网络的逼近能力与连续动力系统联系起来，通过微分同胚流的最小时间逼近问题，建立了深度与逼近效率之间的几何联系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究深度残差网络的逼近能力如何依赖于网络深度，从连续动力系统的角度理解深度学习中的函数逼近机制，揭示其与线性逼近理论的本质区别。

Method: 将深度残差网络建模为连续动力系统，研究给定向量场族驱动的流逼近微分同胚所需的最小时间问题，建立子Finsler流形上的测地距离框架。

Result: 证明了最小逼近时间可以表示为微分同胚子Finsler流形上的测地距离，揭示了目标关系与学习架构选择之间的兼容性决定了学习效率。

Conclusion: 深度学习的核心逼近机制（通过组合或动力学逼近函数）与线性逼近理论有本质区别：线性空间和范数速率估计被流形和测地距离所取代。

Abstract: We investigate the dependence of the approximation capacity of deep residual networks on its depth in a continuous dynamical systems setting. This can be formulated as the general problem of quantifying the minimal time-horizon required to approximate a diffeomorphism by flows driven by a given family $\mathcal F$ of vector fields. We show that this minimal time can be identified as a geodesic distance on a sub-Finsler manifold of diffeomorphisms, where the local geometry is characterised by a variational principle involving $\mathcal F$. This connects the learning efficiency of target relationships to their compatibility with the learning architectural choice. Further, the results suggest that the key approximation mechanism in deep learning, namely the approximation of functions by composition or dynamics, differs in a fundamental way from linear approximation theory, where linear spaces and norm-based rate estimates are replaced by manifolds and geodesic distances.

</details>


### [967] [Local Urysohn Width: A Topological Complexity Measure for Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15412)
*Xin Li*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了局部Urysohn宽度这一新的分类问题复杂度度量，它从拓扑几何角度衡量分类问题本身的复杂性，而非假设类的丰富性。论文证明了四个主要结果：严格层次定理、拓扑×几何缩放定律、与VC维度的双向分离、以及样本复杂度下界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有复杂度度量如VC维度、fat-shattering维度和Rademacher复杂度主要关注假设类的丰富性，但缺乏对分类问题本身拓扑几何复杂性的刻画。作者希望引入一个能够直接反映输入空间拓扑结构对分类器复杂度影响的度量。

Method: 提出局部Urysohn宽度作为新的复杂度度量，定义为在边缘安全区域内正确分类所有点所需的最小连通、直径有界的局部专家数量。通过构造具体分类问题（如圆束）进行理论分析，证明四个主要定理。

Result: 1) 严格层次定理：对于任意整数w≥1，存在连通紧度量空间上的分类问题，其Urysohn宽度恰好为w；2) 拓扑×几何缩放定律：宽度按Ω(w·L/D₀)缩放；3) 与VC维度的双向分离；4) 样本复杂度下界：Ω(w log w)个样本。

Conclusion: 局部Urysohn宽度提供了一个新的视角来理解分类问题的本质复杂性，揭示了拓扑结构对分类器设计的基本限制。该度量与VC维度等传统度量互补，为理解机器学习问题的几何拓扑基础提供了新工具。

Abstract: We introduce \emph{local Urysohn width}, a complexity measure for classification problems on metric spaces. Unlike VC dimension, fat-shattering dimension, and Rademacher complexity, which characterize the richness of hypothesis \emph{classes}, Urysohn width characterizes the topological-geometric complexity of the classification \emph{problem itself}: the minimum number of connected, diameter-bounded local experts needed to correctly classify all points within a margin-safe region. We prove four main results. First, a \textbf{strict hierarchy theorem}: for every integer $w \geq 1$, there exists a classification problem on a \emph{connected} compact metric space (a bouquet of circles with first Betti number $β_1 = w$) whose Urysohn width is exactly~$w$, establishing that topological complexity of the input space forces classifier complexity. Second, a \textbf{topology $\times$ geometry scaling law}: width scales as $Ω(w \cdot L/D_0)$, where $w$ counts independent loops and $L/D_0$ is the ratio of loop circumference to locality scale. Third, a \textbf{two-way separation from VC dimension}: there exist problem families where width grows unboundedly while VC dimension is bounded by a constant, and conversely, families where VC dimension grows unboundedly while width remains~1. Fourth, a \textbf{sample complexity lower bound}: any learner that must correctly classify all points in the safe region of a width-$w$ problem needs $Ω(w \log w)$ samples, independent of VC dimension.

</details>


### [968] [TabKD: Tabular Knowledge Distillation through Interaction Diversity of Learned Feature Bins](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15481)
*Shovon Niverd Pereira,Krishna Khadka,Yu Lei*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: TabKD：一种针对表格数据的无数据知识蒸馏方法，通过自适应特征分箱和最大化特征交互覆盖来提升蒸馏效果


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有无数据知识蒸馏方法在表格数据上表现不佳，因为它们未能明确处理特征交互——这是表格模型编码预测知识的基本方式。特征交互的多样性（系统覆盖特征组合）是有效表格蒸馏的关键要求。

Method: 提出TabKD方法：1）学习与教师决策边界对齐的自适应特征分箱；2）生成最大化成对交互覆盖的合成查询。通过优化特征交互的覆盖范围来提升蒸馏质量。

Result: 在4个基准数据集和4种教师架构上，TabKD在16个配置中的14个取得了最高的师生一致性，优于5个最先进的基线方法。交互覆盖度与蒸馏质量强相关，验证了核心假设。

Conclusion: 该研究确立了以交互为中心的探索作为表格模型提取的原则性框架，为隐私敏感的表格领域提供了有效的无数据知识蒸馏解决方案。

Abstract: Data-free knowledge distillation enables model compression without original training data, critical for privacy-sensitive tabular domains. However, existing methods does not perform well on tabular data because they do not explicitly address feature interactions, the fundamental way tabular models encode predictive knowledge. We identify interaction diversity, systematic coverage of feature combinations, as an essential requirement for effective tabular distillation. To operationalize this insight, we propose TabKD, which learns adaptive feature bins aligned with teacher decision boundaries, then generates synthetic queries that maximize pairwise interaction coverage. Across 4 benchmark datasets and 4 teacher architectures, TabKD achieves highest student-teacher agreement in 14 out of 16 configurations, outperforming 5 state-of-the-art baselines. We further show that interaction coverage strongly correlates with distillation quality, validating our core hypothesis. Our work establishes interaction-focused exploration as a principled framework for tabular model extraction.

</details>


### [969] [Seeking SOTA: Time-Series Forecasting Must Adopt Taxonomy-Specific Evaluation to Dispel Illusory Gains](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15506)
*Raeid Saqur,Christoph Bergmeir,Blanka Horvath,Daniel Schmidt,Frank Rudzicz,Terry Lyons*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 该论文批评当前时间序列预测评估实践，指出标准基准数据集存在强周期性和季节性，使得简单经典方法表现优异，而复杂深度学习模型优势不明显，呼吁改进基准和评估方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前AI/ML时间序列预测模型的评估主要基于具有强周期性和季节性的基准数据集，这种评估方式可能掩盖真实进展，因为简单经典方法在这些数据集上表现优异，而复杂深度学习模型的边际改进可能无法证明其计算开销和模型复杂度的合理性。

Method: 通过分析标准时间序列数据集的特征，展示这些数据集通常具有主导的自相关模式和季节周期，这些模式可以被简单的线性或统计模型有效捕捉。论文提出两个具体建议：1）用更广泛非平稳性特征的数据集替换或增强当前基准；2）要求深度学习提交必须包含针对特定时间序列特征选择的经典基线模型。

Result: 研究表明，在具有强周期性和季节性的标准数据集上，复杂深度学习架构通常不比经典对应模型表现更好，深度学习模型的边际改进可能无法证明其计算开销和模型复杂度的合理性。

Conclusion: 需要改进时间序列预测的评估实践，通过使用更广泛非平稳性特征的数据集和强制包含适当基线模型，确保报告的改进反映真正的科学方法进步，而不是基准选择偏向擅长学习重复模式的模型。

Abstract: We argue that the current practice of evaluating AI/ML time-series forecasting models, predominantly on benchmarks characterized by strong, persistent periodicities and seasonalities, obscures real progress by overlooking the performance of efficient classical methods. We demonstrate that these "standard" datasets often exhibit dominant autocorrelation patterns and seasonal cycles that can be effectively captured by simpler linear or statistical models, rendering complex deep learning architectures frequently no more performant than their classical counterparts for these specific data characteristics, and raising questions as to whether any marginal improvements justify the significant increase in computational overhead and model complexity. We call on the community to (I) retire or substantially augment current benchmarks with datasets exhibiting a wider spectrum of non-stationarities, such as structural breaks, time-varying volatility, and concept drift, and less predictable dynamics drawn from diverse real-world domains, and (II) require every deep learning submission to include robust classical and simple baselines, appropriately chosen for the specific characteristics of the downstream tasks' time series. By doing so, we will help ensure that reported gains reflect genuine scientific methodological advances rather than artifacts of benchmark selection favoring models adept at learning repetitive patterns.

</details>


### [970] [Federated Learning of Binary Neural Networks: Enabling Low-Cost Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15507)
*Nitin Priyadarshini Shankar,Soham Lahiri,Sheetal Kalyani,Saurav Prakash*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: FedBNN：一种面向联邦学习的旋转感知二值神经网络框架，通过直接学习二值表示（权重编码为单比特{+1, -1}）来显著减少模型大小和计算开销，同时保持与实值模型相当的精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 联邦学习在保护隐私的同时，深度神经网络在低功耗边缘设备上进行推理时计算开销大。传统后训练二值化虽然减小模型尺寸，但会因量化误差导致严重精度损失。需要一种能在本地训练中直接学习二值表示的方法，以同时优化内存占用和计算效率。

Method: 提出FedBNN框架，采用旋转感知的二值神经网络，将每个权重编码为单比特{+1, -1}而非32位浮点数。在本地训练过程中直接学习二值表示，显著减少模型占用空间，降低推理时的FLOPs和内存需求。

Result: 在多个基准数据集上的评估表明，FedBNN显著减少了资源消耗，同时性能与使用实值模型的现有联邦学习方法相当。

Conclusion: FedBNN通过直接学习二值表示，有效解决了联邦学习中边缘设备资源受限的问题，在保持精度的同时大幅降低了计算和内存开销。

Abstract: Federated Learning (FL) preserves privacy by distributing training across devices. However, using DNNs is computationally intensive at the low-powered edge during inference. Edge deployment demands models that simultaneously optimize memory footprint and computational efficiency, a dilemma where conventional DNNs fail by exceeding resource limits. Traditional post-training binarization reduces model size but suffers from severe accuracy loss due to quantization errors. To address these challenges, we propose FedBNN, a rotation-aware binary neural network framework that learns binary representations directly during local training. By encoding each weight as a single bit $\{+1, -1\}$ instead of a $32$-bit float, FedBNN shrinks the model footprint, significantly reducing runtime (during inference) FLOPs and memory requirements in comparison to federated methods using real models. Evaluations across multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate that FedBNN significantly reduces resource consumption while performing similarly to existing federated methods using real-valued models.

</details>


### [971] [Building Trust in PINNs: Error Estimation through Finite Difference Methods](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15526)
*Aleksander Krasowski,René P. Klausen,Aycan Celik,Sebastian Lapuschkin,Wojciech Samek,Jonas Naujoks*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出一种轻量级后处理方法，为物理信息神经网络（PINNs）的预测提供逐点误差估计，增强PINNs的可解释性和可信度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: PINNs作为求解偏微分方程的灵活深度学习方法，虽然应用广泛，但缺乏对其预测误差的洞察，难以评估预测质量的可信度。

Method: 对于线性偏微分方程，利用PINN近似解与真实解之间的误差满足与原问题相同微分算子的特性，将PINN的PDE残差作为源项，使用有限差分法数值求解误差方程。

Result: 在多个基准PDE问题上，该方法能以低计算成本生成准确的误差分布图，实现对PINNs的针对性、可解释性验证。

Conclusion: 该方法为PINNs提供了实用的误差估计工具，增强了模型的可解释性和可信度，有助于在实际应用中更好地理解和验证PINN预测。

Abstract: Physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) constitute a flexible deep learning approach for solving partial differential equations (PDEs), which model phenomena ranging from heat conduction to quantum mechanical systems. Despite their flexibility, PINNs offer limited insight into how their predictions deviate from the true solution, hindering trust in their prediction quality. We propose a lightweight post-hoc method that addresses this gap by producing pointwise error estimates for PINN predictions, which offer a natural form of explanation for such models, identifying not just whether a prediction is wrong, but where and by how much. For linear partial differential equations, the error between a PINN approximation and the true solution satisfies the same differential operator as the original problem, but driven by the PINN's PDE residual as its source term. We solve this error equation numerically using finite difference methods requiring no knowledge of the true solution. Evaluated on several benchmark PDEs, our method yields accurate error maps at low computational cost, enabling targeted and interpretable validation of PINNs.

</details>


### [972] [Vib2ECG: A Paired Chest-Lead SCG-ECG Dataset and Benchmark for ECG Reconstruction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15539)
*Guorui Lu,Xiaohui Cai,Todor Stefanov,Qinyu Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: Vib2ECG：首个配对多通道心脏电-机械信号数据集，包含12导联ECG和6个胸导位置的IMU振动信号，用于从低成本振动信号重建临床诊断所需的多导联ECG。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统12导联ECG长期监测硬件复杂昂贵，现有方法只能重建肢体导联，而临床诊断需要包含胸导的多导联ECG。缺乏配对的多通道心脏电-机械信号数据集限制了相关研究。

Method: 构建Vib2ECG数据集（17名受试者，包含完整12导联ECG和6个胸导位置的IMU振动信号），使用轻量级364K参数U-Net模型从振动信号重建不同位置的ECG信号。

Result: 实验证明从振动信号重建不同位置ECG信号的可行性，同时观察到模型幻觉现象（在无对应电活动区域生成ECG波形），分析了原因并提出缓解方向。

Conclusion: 通过胸导ECG预测实现移动设备友好的ECG监测，扩展了心脏振动信号应用，为心脏电-机械活动空间关系提供了新见解。

Abstract: Twelve-lead electrocardiography (ECG) is essential for cardiovascular diagnosis, but its long-term acquisition in daily life is constrained by complex and costly hardware. Recent efforts have explored reconstructing ECG from low-cost cardiac vibrational signals such as seismocardiography (SCG), however, due to the lack of a dataset, current methods are limited to limb leads, while clinical diagnosis requires multi-lead ECG, including chest leads. In this work, we propose Vib2ECG, the first paired, multi-channel electro-mechanical cardiac signal dataset, which includes complete twelve-lead ECGs and vibrational signals acquired by inertial measurement units (IMUs) at six chest-lead positions from 17 subjects. Based on this dataset, we also provide a benchmark. Experimental results demonstrate the feasibility of reconstructing electrical cardiac signals at variable locations from vibrational signals using a lightweight 364 K-parameter U-Net. Furthermore, we observe a hallucination phenomenon in the model, where ECG waveforms are generated in regions where no corresponding electrical activity is present. We analyze the causes of this phenomenon and propose potential directions for mitigation. This study demonstrates the feasibility of mobile-device-friendly ECG monitoring through chest-lead ECG prediction from low-cost vibrational signals acquired using IMU sensors. It expands the application of cardiac vibrational signals and provides new insights into the spatial relationship between cardiac electrical and mechanical activities with spatial location variation.

</details>


### [973] [Robust and Computationally Efficient Linear Contextual Bandits under Adversarial Corruption and Heavy-Tailed Noise](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15596)
*Naoto Tani,Futoshi Futami*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出一种基于在线镜像下降的线性上下文赌博机算法，能同时处理对抗性污染和重尾噪声，计算效率高（每轮O(1)），无需先验知识噪声矩界或污染总量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有同时处理对抗性污染和重尾噪声的方法依赖有限方差假设且计算效率低（O(t log T)），需要开发更高效、无需先验知识的鲁棒算法。

Method: 基于在线镜像下降的算法设计，通过优化技术实现每轮O(1)计算复杂度，能同时处理对抗性污染和具有有限(1+ε)阶矩的重尾噪声。

Result: 算法实现亚线性遗憾界，包含噪声(1+ε)阶矩项和污染总量项。当ε=1时恢复有限方差结果，无污染时匹配重尾噪声最佳已知率。

Conclusion: 提出的算法在计算效率（每轮O(1)）和鲁棒性（对抗污染+重尾噪声）方面优于现有方法，且无需先验知识，具有实际应用价值。

Abstract: We study linear contextual bandits under adversarial corruption and heavy-tailed noise with finite $(1+ε)$-th moments for some $ε\in (0,1]$. Existing work that addresses both adversarial corruption and heavy-tailed noise relies on a finite variance (i.e., finite second-moment) assumption and suffers from computational inefficiency. We propose a computationally efficient algorithm based on online mirror descent that achieves robustness to both adversarial corruption and heavy-tailed noise. While the existing algorithm incurs $\mathcal{O}(t\log T)$ computational cost, our algorithm reduces this to $\mathcal{O}(1)$ per round. We establish an additive regret bound consisting of a term depending on the $(1+ε)$-moment bound of the noise and a term depending on the total amount of corruption. In particular, when $ε= 1$, our result recovers existing guarantees under finite-variance assumptions. When no corruption is present, it matches the best-known rates for linear contextual bandits with heavy-tailed noise. Moreover, the algorithm requires no prior knowledge of the noise moment bound or the total amount of corruption and still guarantees sublinear regret.

</details>


### [974] [Bullet Trains: Parallelizing Training of Temporally Precise Spiking Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13283)
*Todd Morrill,Christian Pehle,Anthony Zador*

Main category: cs.NE

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出了并行关联扫描和可微分脉冲时间求解器，解决了事件型脉冲神经网络训练中的两个关键挑战：顺序处理限制和精确脉冲时间计算问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 连续时间、事件原生脉冲神经网络（SNNs）严格基于脉冲事件操作，将脉冲时间和顺序视为表示而非时间离散化的产物。这种观点与生物计算、事件传感器和神经形态处理器的原生分辨率一致，同时使计算和内存随事件数量扩展。然而，两个挑战阻碍了实用的端到端可训练事件型SNN系统：1）精确的充电-放电-重置动态要求顺序处理输入脉冲；2）必须在没有时间分箱的情况下精确求解脉冲时间。

Method: 1）使用并行关联扫描同时处理多个输入脉冲，相比顺序模拟实现高达44倍加速，同时保留精确的硬重置动态；2）实现可微分脉冲时间求解器，无需离散时间近似或限制性解析假设，以机器精度计算脉冲时间。

Result: 在四个事件型数据集上使用GPU训练SNN，证明了所提解决方案的可行性。

Conclusion: 通过并行关联扫描和可微分脉冲时间求解器，解决了事件型脉冲神经网络训练中的关键瓶颈，为实用的端到端可训练事件型SNN系统铺平了道路。

Abstract: Continuous-time, event-native spiking neural networks (SNNs) operate strictly on spike events, treating spike timing and ordering as the representation rather than an artifact of time discretization. This viewpoint aligns with biological computation and with the native resolution of event sensors and neuromorphic processors, while enabling compute and memory that scale with the number of events. However, two challenges hinder practical, end-to-end trainable event-based SNN systems: 1) exact charge--fire--reset dynamics impose inherently sequential processing of input spikes, and 2) precise spike times must be solved without time bins. We address both. First, we use parallel associative scans to consume multiple input spikes at once, yielding up to 44x speedups over sequential simulation while retaining exact hard-reset dynamics. Second, we implement differentiable spike-time solvers that compute spike times to machine precision without discrete-time approximations or restrictive analytic assumptions. We demonstrate the viability of training SNNs using our solutions on four event-based datasets on GPUs.

</details>


### [975] [Nepali Passport Question Answering: A Low-Resource Dataset for Public Service Applications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13320)
*Funghang Limbu Begha,Praveen Acharya,Bal Krishna Bal*

Main category: cs.IR

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 该研究为低资源尼泊尔语构建了护照服务FAQ问答数据集，并微调了基于Transformer的嵌入模型用于语义相似度检索，发现多语言E5嵌入模型性能最佳，且混合检索方法优于单一基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尼泊尔语作为低资源语言，缺乏标注数据和计算语言学资源，难以构建有效的信息检索系统。研究旨在填补这一空白，为护照相关服务构建FAQ问答数据集，以训练和评估IR模型。

Method: 1) 构建了结构化的尼泊尔语问答数据集（护照服务FAQ）；2) 微调了基于Transformer的嵌入模型（SBERT和多语言E5）用于语义相似度检索；3) 实现了混合检索方法，将微调模型与BM25结合；4) 与基线BM25进行性能比较。

Result: 微调的SBERT模型优于BM25基线，而多语言E5嵌入模型在所有评估模型中达到最高检索性能。混合检索方法进一步提升了检索效果。

Conclusion: 该研究成功为低资源尼泊尔语构建了实用的问答检索系统，证明了微调Transformer嵌入模型在低资源语言IR任务中的有效性，特别是多语言E5模型表现出色。

Abstract: Nepali, a low-resource language, faces significant challenges in building an effective information retrieval system due to the unavailability of annotated data and computational linguistic resources. In this study, we attempt to address this gap by preparing a pair-structured Nepali Question-Answer dataset. We focus on Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs) for passport-related services, building a data set for training and evaluation of IR models. In our study, we have fine-tuned transformer-based embedding models for semantic similarity in question-answer retrieval. The fine-tuned models were compared with the baseline BM25. In addition, we implement a hybrid retrieval approach, integrating fine-tuned models with BM25, and evaluate the performance of the hybrid retrieval. Our results show that the fine-tuned SBERT-based models outperform BM25, whereas multilingual E5 embedding-based models achieve the highest retrieval performance among all evaluated models.

</details>


### [976] [Filtered Spectral Projection for Quantum Principal Component Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13441)
*Sk Mujaffar Hossain,Satadeep Bhattacharjee*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 论文提出FSPA算法，绕过显式特征值估计直接进行谱投影，在量子主成分分析中保留关键谱结构，适用于小间隙和近简并情况。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统量子主成分分析(qPCA)通常关注特征值和特征向量的提取，但在许多实际应用中，真正的目标只是将数据投影到主导谱子空间。作者希望开发一种更简单直接的方法，绕过复杂的特征值估计过程。

Method: 提出过滤谱投影算法(FSPA)，该算法：1) 绕过显式特征值估计；2) 放大与主导主成分子空间的任何非零初始重叠；3) 在小间隙和近简并情况下保持鲁棒性；4) 在无偏情况下不引入人为对称破缺。同时建立了量子态与经典数据集之间的联系。

Result: 在乳腺癌威斯康星和手写数字等基准数据集上的数值实验表明，只要投影质量得到保持，下游性能保持稳定。对于幅度编码的中心化数据，集合密度矩阵与协方差矩阵一致。

Conclusion: 在一大类qPCA设置中，谱投影是基本原语，显式特征值估计通常是不必要的。FSPA为量子主成分分析提供了更简单有效的替代方案。

Abstract: Quantum principal component analysis (qPCA) is commonly formulated as the extraction of eigenvalues and eigenvectors of a covariance-encoded density operator. Yet in many qPCA settings, the practical objective is simpler: projecting data onto the dominant spectral subspace. In this work, we introduce a projection-first framework, the Filtered Spectral Projection Algorithm (FSPA), which bypasses explicit eigenvalue estimation while preserving the essential spectral structure. FSPA amplifies any nonzero warm-start overlap with the leading principal subspace and remains robust in small-gap and near-degenerate regimes without inducing artificial symmetry breaking in the absence of bias. To connect this approach to classical datasets, we show that for amplitude-encoded centered data, the ensemble density matrix $ρ=\sum_i p_i|ψ_i\rangle\langleψ_i|$ coincides with the covariance matrix. For uncentered data, $ρ$ corresponds to PCA without centering, and we derive eigenvalue interlacing bounds quantifying the deviation from standard PCA. We further show that ensembles of quantum states admit an equivalent centered covariance interpretation. Numerical demonstrations on benchmark datasets, including Breast Cancer Wisconsin and handwritten Digits, show that downstream performance remains stable whenever projection quality is preserved. These results suggest that, in a broad class of qPCA settings, spectral projection is the essential primitive, and explicit eigenvalue estimation is often unnecessary.

</details>


### [977] [Standard Acquisition Is Sufficient for Asynchronous Bayesian Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13501)
*Ben Riegler,James Odgers,Vincent Fortuin*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 异步贝叶斯优化中，传统方法认为标准采集函数会导致冗余查询，但本文证明UCB等标准方法能达到与顺序Thompson采样相当的保证，中间后验更新足以避免冗余，而强制多样性的方法可能过度探索。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 挑战异步贝叶斯优化领域的根本前提：现有方法认为标准采集函数会导致冗余和重复查询，因此提出复杂的多样性强制解决方案。本文旨在验证这一前提是否正确，并分析异步设置中的实际优化行为。

Method: 通过概念分析揭示现有方法忽略了中间后验更新，理论证明UCB等方法能达到与顺序Thompson采样相当的保证。进一步研究表明，通过惩罚繁忙位置来强制多样性的方法在异步设置中可能导致过度探索。在合成和真实世界任务上进行广泛实验验证。

Result: 实验表明，简单的标准采集函数（如UCB）在异步贝叶斯优化中能够匹配或超越专门设计的异步方法。多样性强制方法可能因过度探索而性能下降，而中间后验更新通常足以避免冗余查询。

Conclusion: 异步贝叶斯优化不需要复杂的多样性强制机制，标准采集函数配合中间后验更新就能有效工作。这简化了异步优化实践，挑战了该领域的传统假设。

Abstract: Asynchronous Bayesian optimization is widely used for gradient-free optimization in domains with independent parallel experiments and varying evaluation times. Existing methods posit that standard acquisitions lead to redundant and repeated queries, proposing complex solutions to enforce diversity in queries. Challenging this fundamental premise, we show that methods, like the Upper Confidence Bound, can in fact achieve theoretical guarantees essentially equivalent to those of sequential Thompson sampling. A conceptual analysis of asynchronous Bayesian optimization reveals that existing works neglect intermediate posterior updates, which we find to be generally sufficient to avoid redundant queries. Further investigation shows that by penalizing busy locations, diversity-enforcing methods can over-explore in asynchronous settings, reducing their performance. Our extensive experiments demonstrate that simple standard acquisition functions match or outperform purpose-built asynchronous methods across synthetic and real-world tasks.

</details>


### [978] [AMES: Approximate Multi-modal Enterprise Search via Late Interaction Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13537)
*Tony Joseph,Carlos Pareja,David Lopes Pegna,Abhishek Singh*

Main category: cs.IR

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: AMES是一个统一的多模态延迟交互检索架构，支持文本、图像和视频的跨模态检索，可在企业搜索引擎中部署而无需架构重构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决企业环境中多模态检索的部署难题，传统方法需要为不同模态设计特定检索逻辑，而AMES旨在实现统一的后端无关架构，使细粒度多模态延迟交互检索能在生产级企业搜索引擎中直接部署。

Method: 采用统一的多模态延迟交互检索架构：1) 使用多向量编码器将文本标记、图像块和视频帧嵌入共享表示空间；2) 两阶段流水线：并行标记级近似最近邻搜索（Top-M MaxSim近似），然后加速器优化的精确MaxSim重排序；3) 后端无关设计，可在Solr等企业搜索引擎中部署。

Result: 在ViDoRe V3基准测试中，AMES实现了具有竞争力的排序性能，同时保持了可扩展性和生产就绪性，证明了细粒度多模态延迟交互检索可以在生产级企业搜索引擎中部署而无需架构重构。

Conclusion: AMES展示了统一的多模态延迟交互检索架构的可行性，该架构后端无关，能够在生产级企业搜索引擎中部署，为实际企业应用中的多模态检索提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: We present AMES (Approximate Multimodal Enterprise Search), a unified multimodal late interaction retrieval architecture which is backend agnostic. AMES demonstrates that fine-grained multimodal late interaction retrieval can be deployed within a production grade enterprise search engine without architectural redesign. Text tokens, image patches, and video frames are embedded into a shared representation space using multi-vector encoders, enabling cross-modal retrieval without modality specific retrieval logic. AMES employs a two-stage pipeline: parallel token level ANN search with per document Top-M MaxSim approximation, followed by accelerator optimized Exact MaxSim re-ranking. Experiments on the ViDoRe V3 benchmark show that AMES achieves competitive ranking performance within a scalable, production ready Solr based system.

</details>


### [979] [Robust Automatic Differentiation of Square-Root Kalman Filters via Gramian Differentials](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13559)
*Adrien Corenflos*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出一种用于平方根卡尔曼滤波器的可微三角化方法，通过Gramian恒等式解决QR分解梯度不唯一和奇异性问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 平方根卡尔曼滤波器在状态空间模型参数学习中需要可微的三角化操作，但传统QR分解存在梯度不唯一和奇异性问题

Method: 基于Gramian恒等式推导闭式链式法则，通过Moore-Penrose伪逆处理列空间项，并添加零空间校正项

Result: 证明了该方法对卡尔曼对数边际似然和滤波矩是精确的，并能处理秩亏输入

Conclusion: 提出的方法解决了平方根卡尔曼滤波器参数学习中的梯度计算问题，为状态空间模型的可微学习提供了稳定方案

Abstract: Square-root Kalman filters propagate state covariances in Cholesky-factor form for numerical stability, and are a natural target for gradient-based parameter learning in state-space models. Their core operation, triangularization of a matrix $M \in \mathbb{R}^{n \times m}$, is computed via a QR decomposition in practice, but naively differentiating through it causes two problems: the semi-orthogonal factor is non-unique when $m > n$, yielding undefined gradients; and the standard Jacobian formula involves inverses, which diverges when $M$ is rank-deficient. Both are resolved by the observation that all filter outputs relevant to learning depend on the input matrix only through the Gramian $MM^\top$, so the composite loss is smooth in $M$ even where the triangularization is not. We derive a closed-form chain-rule directly from the differential of this Gramian identity, prove it exact for the Kalman log-marginal likelihood and filtered moments, and extend it to rank-deficient inputs via a two-component decomposition: a column-space term based on the Moore--Penrose pseudoinverse, and a null-space correction for perturbations outside the column space of $M$.

</details>


### [980] [Benchmarking the Energy Cost of Assurance in Neuromorphic Edge Robotics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13880)
*Sylvester Kaczmarek*

Main category: cs.NE

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 该论文研究了在边缘机器人系统中实现可信AI的能耗与鲁棒性权衡问题，提出了一种基于事件驱动神经形态计算的层次时间防御框架，在BrainChip Akida处理器上实现了高效对抗防御。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在边缘机器人部署可信AI面临鲁棒性与能耗的权衡难题。传统对抗防御机制计算开销大，威胁功率受限平台（如月球空间环境）的可行性。需要量化神经形态系统中的保证能耗成本。

Method: 提出层次时间防御（HTD）框架，在BrainChip Akida AKD1000神经形态处理器上实现事件驱动架构。通过波动门控可塑性机制诱导网络稀疏性，对抗梯度攻击和时间抖动攻击。

Result: 梯度攻击成功率从82.1%降至18.7%，时间抖动攻击成功率从75.8%降至25.1%，同时保持约45微焦耳/推理的能耗。完全防御配置下动态功耗反而降低，归因于网络稀疏性增加。

Conclusion: 神经形态稀疏性能够实现可持续的高保证边缘自主性，事件驱动架构在鲁棒性和效率方面优于传统深度学习防御，为功率受限平台提供了可行的可信AI解决方案。

Abstract: Deploying trustworthy artificial intelligence on edge robotics imposes a difficult trade-off between high-assurance robustness and energy sustainability. Traditional defense mechanisms against adversarial attacks typically incur significant computational overhead, threatening the viability of power-constrained platforms in environments such as cislunar space. This paper quantifies the energy cost of assurance in event-driven neuromorphic systems. We benchmark the Hierarchical Temporal Defense (HTD) framework on the BrainChip Akida AKD1000 processor against a suite of adversarial temporal attacks. We demonstrate that unlike traditional deep learning defenses which often degrade efficiency significantly with increased robustness, the event-driven nature of the proposed architecture achieves a superior trade-off. The system reduces gradient-based adversarial success rates from 82.1% to 18.7% and temporal jitter success rates from 75.8% to 25.1%, while maintaining an energy consumption of approximately 45 microjoules per inference. We report a counter-intuitive reduction in dynamic power consumption in the fully defended configuration, attributed to volatility-gated plasticity mechanisms that induce higher network sparsity. These results provide empirical evidence that neuromorphic sparsity enables sustainable and high-assurance edge autonomy.

</details>


### [981] [MO-SAE:Multi-Objective Stacked Autoencoders Optimization for Edge Anomaly Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13895)
*Lizhao Zhang,Shengsong Kong,Tao Guo,Shaobo Li,Zhenzhou Ji*

Main category: cs.NE

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出MO-SAE框架，通过多目标优化解决边缘异常检测中堆叠自编码器的资源消耗问题，在保持性能的同时显著降低存储、功耗并提升推理速度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 堆叠自编码器在边缘异常检测中广泛应用，但资源消耗大，难以适应资源受限的边缘设备动态变化的需求。需要平衡存储、功耗、推理速度和模型更新等多方面约束。

Method: 将SAE优化建模为多目标优化问题，提出MO-SAE框架，集成模型剪枝、多分支退出设计和矩阵近似技术，采用多目标启发式算法平衡竞争目标。

Result: 在x86架构上：存储空间和功耗降低至少50%，运行效率提升至少28%，压缩率达到11.8%，同时保持应用性能。在ARM边缘设备上：推理速度提升15%，支持云边协同异常检测系统高效部署。

Conclusion: MO-SAE框架有效解决了边缘设备上SAE的资源约束问题，实现了性能与效率的良好平衡，为边缘AI部署提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: Stacked AutoEncoders (SAE) have been widely adopted in edge anomaly detection scenarios. However, the resource-intensive nature of SAE can pose significant challenges for edge devices, which are typically resource-constrained and must adapt rapidly to dynamic and changing conditions. Optimizing SAE to meet the heterogeneous demands of real-world deployment scenarios, including high performance under constrained storage, low power consumption, fast inference, and efficient model updates, remains a substantial challenge. To address this, we propose an integrated optimization framework that jointly considers these critical factors to achieve balanced and adaptive system-level optimization. Specifically, we formulate SAE optimization for edge anomaly detection as a multi-objective optimization problem and propose MO-SAE (Multi-Objective Stacked AutoEncoders). The multiple objectives are addressed by integrating model clipping, multi-branch exit design, and a matrix approximation technique. In addition, a multi-objective heuristic algorithm is employed to effectively balance the competing objectives in SAE optimization. Our results demonstrate that the proposed MO-SAE delivers substantial improvements over the original approach. On the x86 architecture, it reduces storage space and power consumption by at least 50%, improves runtime efficiency by no less than 28%, and achieves an 11.8% compression rate, all while maintaining application performance. Furthermore, MO-SAE runs efficiently on edge devices with ARM architecture. Experimental results show a 15% improvement in inference speed, facilitating efficient deployment in cloud-edge collaborative anomaly detection systems.

</details>


### [982] [Generative Inverse Design of Cold Metals for Low-Power Electronics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13920)
*Kedeng Wu,Yucheng Zhu,Yan Chen,Bizhu Zhang,Shuyu Liu,Xiaobin Deng,Yabei Wu,Liangliang Zhu,Hang Xiao*

Main category: cond-mat.mtrl-sci

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 使用MatterGPT生成三维冷金属材料的逆设计工作流，通过条件自回归Transformer在SLICES晶体表示上训练，发现了257种新型冷金属材料


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 冷金属具有靠近费米能级的本征能隙，可用于陡坡晶体管和低功耗电子应用。传统高通量筛选仅限于已知化合物，需要开发生成式方法来扩展冷金属的化学空间。

Method: 使用MatterGPT（条件自回归Transformer）在SLICES（可逆且对称不变的晶体字符串表示）上训练，针对热力学稳定性和50-500 meV能带边缘距离进行属性条件生成，通过对称性、唯一性和新颖性过滤器筛选，最后进行高通量DFT验证。

Result: 生成了148,506个独特候选物，92.1%成功重建为3D结构，识别出257种相对于Materials Project数据库新颖的冷金属，能隙范围50-500 meV，代表性候选物通过第一性原理计算确认了动力学稳定性和接触相关功函数。

Conclusion: SLICES支持的生成式Transformer能够超越高通量筛选，扩展冷金属的化学空间，为低功耗电子材料发现提供了新途径。

Abstract: Cold metals are a class of metals with an intrinsic energy gap located close to the Fermi level, which enables cold-carrier injection for steep-slope transistors and is therefore promising for low-power electronic applications. High-throughput screening has revealed 252 three-dimensional (3D) cold metals in the Materials Project database, but database searches are inherently limited to known compounds. Here we present an inverse-design workflow that generates 3D cold metals using MatterGPT, a conditional autoregressive Transformer trained on SLICES, an invertible and symmetry-invariant crystal string representation. We curate a training set of 26,309 metallic structures labeled with energy above hull and a unified band-edge distance descriptor that merges p-type and n-type cold-metal characteristics to address severe label imbalance. Property-conditioned generation targeting thermodynamic stability and 50-500 meV band-edge distances produces 148,506 unique candidates; 92.1% are successfully reconstructed to 3D structures and down-selected by symmetry, uniqueness and novelty filters, followed by high-throughput DFT validation. We identify 257 cold metals verified as novel with respect to the Materials Project database, with gaps around the Fermi level spanning 50-500 meV. First-principles phonon, electronic-structure, and work-function calculations for representative candidates confirm dynamical stability and contact-relevant work functions. Our results demonstrate that SLICES-enabled generative transformers can expand the chemical space of cold metals beyond high-throughput screening, providing a route to low-power electronic materials discovery.

</details>


### [983] [Exploiting temporal parallelism for LSTM Autoencoder acceleration on FPGA](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13982)
*Aimilios Leftheriotis,Dimosthenis Masouros,Dimitrios Soudris,George Theodoridis*

Main category: cs.AR

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于FPGA的数据流架构加速器，用于并行处理LSTM自动编码器的多层时间步，在异常检测任务中实现了显著的延迟降低和能效提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LSTM自动编码器在时间序列异常检测中很有效，但存在顺序依赖限制并行计算的问题。现有FPGA加速工作通常只优化单层LSTM，缺乏对多层并行处理的支持。

Method: 设计了一种基于FPGA的数据流架构加速器，利用时间并行性实现不同时间步的并发多层处理。在Zynq UltraScale+ MPSoC FPGA上实现了四种不同宽度和深度的LSTM-AE模型。

Result: 相比CPU（Intel Xeon Gold 5218R）和GPU（NVIDIA V100），加速器实现了高达79.6倍（vs CPU）和18.2倍（vs GPU）的延迟加速，能效提升分别达1722倍和59.3倍，并展现出更好的网络深度可扩展性。

Conclusion: 该FPGA加速器方法为基于LSTM-AE的异常检测提供了高性能、实时、高能效的解决方案，特别适合需要低延迟和高能效的应用场景。

Abstract: Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs) are vital for sequential data processing. Long Short-Term Memory Autoencoders (LSTM-AEs) are particularly effective for unsupervised anomaly detection in time-series data. However, inherent sequential dependencies limit parallel computation. While previous work has explored FPGA-based acceleration for LSTM networks, efforts have typically focused on optimizing a single LSTM layer at a time. We introduce a novel FPGA-based accelerator using a dataflow architecture that exploits temporal parallelism for concurrent multi-layer processing of different timesteps within sequences. Experimental evaluations on four representative LSTM-AE models with varying widths and depths, implemented on a Zynq UltraScale+ MPSoC FPGA, demonstrate significant advantages over CPU (Intel Xeon Gold 5218R) and GPU (NVIDIA V100) implementations. Our accelerator achieves latency speedups up to 79.6x vs. CPU and 18.2x vs. GPU, alongside energy-per-timestep reductions of up to 1722x vs. CPU and 59.3x vs. GPU. These results, including superior network depth scalability, highlight our approach's potential for high-performance, real-time, power-efficient LSTM-AE-based anomaly detection on FPGAs.

</details>


### [984] [Location Aware Embedding for Geotargeting in Sponsored Search Advertising](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13997)
*Jelena Gligorijevic,Djordje Gligorijevic,Aravindan Raghuveer,Mihajlo Grbovic,Zoran Obradovic*

Main category: cs.IR

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出基于神经嵌入的框架，将用户查询和位置信息统一编码到低维空间，提升广告排序和查询-广告相关性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着移动设备普及，包含位置信息的查询日益增多（如"纽约最佳酒店"或"附近咖啡店"）。理解用户查询的上下文（包括位置、时间、搜索历史等）对于提供相关用户体验至关重要，特别是对于广告排名和查询-广告相关性任务。

Method: 开发简单而强大的神经嵌入框架，将用户查询及其位置信息共同映射到单一低维空间中。该表示能够捕捉查询意图与位置之间的微妙交互。

Result: 该表示方法在广告排序和查询-广告相关性得分上优于其他不考虑位置的方法和位置感知方法，能够有效捕捉用户查询意图与位置之间的交互。

Conclusion: 提出的神经嵌入框架能够有效表示用户查询和位置信息，改善搜索体验和广告相关性，为位置感知搜索系统提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: Web search has become an inevitable part of everyday life. Improving and monetizing web search has been a focus of major Internet players. Understanding the context of web search query is an important aspect of this task as it represents unobserved facts that add meaning to an otherwise incomplete query.The context of a query consists of user's location, local time, search history, behavioral segments, installed apps on their phone and so on. Queries that either explicitly use location context (eg: "best hotels in New York City") or implicitly refer to the user's physical location (e.g. "coffee shops near me") are becoming increasingly common on mobile devices. Understanding and representing the user's interest location and/or physical location is essential for providing a relevant user experience. In this study, we developed a simple and powerful neural embedding based framework to represent a user's query and their location in a single low-dimensional space. We show that this representation is able to capture the subtle interactions between the user's query intent and query/physical location, while improving the ad ranking and query-ad relevance scores over other location-unaware approaches and location-aware approaches.

</details>


### [985] [The Taxonomies, Training, and Applications of Event Stream Modelling for Electronic Health Records](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14003)
*Mingcheng Zhu,Yu Liu,Zhiyao Luo,Tingting Zhu*

Main category: eess.SP

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 这篇综述论文为电子健康记录（EHR）事件流建模建立了统一框架，提出了基于事件时间、类型和值处理的新分类法，系统回顾了从监督学习到自监督学习的训练策略，并讨论了临床应用和未来挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 电子健康记录（EHR）包含异质临床数据，传统多变量时间序列方法难以处理真实临床工作流程的稀疏性和不规则性。虽然事件流表示法能保留患者旅程的精确时间结构，但现有研究存在定义不一致、架构分散、训练协议不统一等问题，需要建立统一框架来指导下一代医疗模型开发。

Method: 1. 建立统一的EHR事件流定义
2. 提出基于事件时间、类型和值处理的新分类法
3. 系统回顾训练策略（监督学习、自监督学习等）
4. 全面讨论不同临床场景的应用
5. 识别关键挑战和未来方向

Result: 1. 为EHR事件流建模提供了标准化框架和分类体系
2. 系统整理了现有建模架构和训练方法
3. 明确了临床应用场景和评估标准
4. 识别了当前领域的关键挑战和研究空白

Conclusion: 通过建立统一的EHR事件流定义和分类法，本文澄清了当前研究现状，为开发下一代医疗人工智能模型提供了指导框架，有助于推动医疗AI从传统时间序列方法向更灵活的事件流表示转变。

Abstract: The widespread adoption of electronic health records (EHRs) enables the acquisition of heterogeneous clinical data, spanning lab tests, vital signs, medications, and procedures, which offer transformative potential for artificial intelligence in healthcare. Although traditional modelling approaches have typically relied on multivariate time series, they often struggle to accommodate the inherent sparsity and irregularity of real-world clinical workflows. Consequently, research has shifted toward event stream representation, which treats patient records as continuous sequences, thereby preserving the precise temporal structure of the patient journey. However, the existing literature remains fragmented, characterised by inconsistent definitions, disparate modelling architectures, and varying training protocols. To address these gaps, this review establishes a unified definition of EHR event streams and introduces a novel taxonomy that categorises models based on their handling of event time, type, and value. We systematically review training strategies, ranging from supervised learning to self-supervised methods, and provide a comprehensive discussion of applications across clinical scenarios. Finally, we identify open critical challenges and future directions, with the aim of clarifying the current landscape and guiding the development of next-generation healthcare models.

</details>


### [986] [Evaluating Four FPGA-accelerated Space Use Cases based on Neural Network Algorithms for On-board Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14091)
*Pedro Antunes,Muhammad Ihsan Al Hafiz,Jonah Ekelund,Ekaterina Dineva,George Miloshevich,Panagiotis Gonidakis,Artur Podobas*

Main category: cs.AR

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 该论文评估了在AMD ZCU104 FPGA板上加速神经网络推理，用于空间任务中的数据处理，相比ARM CPU实现了最高34.16倍的推理速度提升，能耗降低，支持更多算子类型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 空间任务中高保真传感器产生的数据量超过星载缓冲和下传容量，需要高效的神经网络加速方案来处理数据过滤、压缩和事件检测，缓解下传压力。

Method: 使用AMD ZCU104 FPGA板，通过Vitis AI（AMD DPU）和Vitis HLS两种方法实现神经网络推理，量化吞吐量和能耗，分析工具链和架构约束。

Result: Vitis AI相比ARM CPU基线实现最高34.16倍推理速率提升；自定义HLS设计达到最高5.4倍加速，支持DPU中缺失的算子（如sigmoid、3D层）；MPSoC推理功耗1.5-6.75W，所有用例中每推理能耗均低于CPU执行。

Conclusion: FPGA神经网络加速能够实现星载数据过滤、压缩和事件检测，缓解未来空间任务的下传压力，为空间应用提供高效计算解决方案。

Abstract: Space missions increasingly deploy high-fidelity sensors that produce data volumes exceeding onboard buffering and downlink capacity. This work evaluates FPGA acceleration of neural networks (NNs) across four space use cases on the AMD ZCU104 board. We use Vitis AI (AMD DPU) and Vitis HLS to implement inference, quantify throughput and energy, and expose toolchain and architectural constraints relevant to deployment. Vitis AI achieves up to 34.16$\times$ higher inference rate than the embedded ARM CPU baseline, while custom HLS designs reach up to 5.4$\times$ speedup and add support for operators (e.g., sigmoids, 3D layers) absent in the DPU. For these implementations, measured MPSoC inference power spans 1.5-6.75 W, reducing energy per inference versus CPU execution in all use cases. These results show that NN FPGA acceleration can enable onboard filtering, compression, and event detection, easing downlink pressure in future missions.

</details>


### [987] [Solving physics-constrained inverse problems with conditional flow matching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14135)
*Agnimitra Dasgupta,Ali Fardisi,Mehrnegar Aminy,Brianna Binder,Bryan Shaddy,Assad Oberai*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出条件流匹配框架解决物理约束贝叶斯逆问题，无需显式评估先验和似然密度，直接从源分布传输样本到后验分布，分析有限训练数据下学习速度场的退化行为（方差崩溃和选择性记忆），通过早停缓解退化


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决物理约束贝叶斯逆问题中传统方法需要显式评估先验和似然密度的限制，提出黑盒框架处理非线性、高维、不可微前向模型，同时分析有限训练数据下深度生成模型的退化行为

Method: 条件流匹配框架：训练神经网络学习概率流常微分方程的速度场，将源分布样本直接传输到观测条件下的后验分布；支持高斯和数据驱动先验；分析有限训练数据下过训练导致的方差崩溃和选择性记忆现象

Result: 方法能准确捕捉复杂多峰后验分布，计算高效；过训练会导致条件分布退化，但标准早停准则能有效缓解；在多个物理逆问题上验证了有效性

Conclusion: 条件流匹配为物理约束贝叶斯逆问题提供了有效的黑盒解决方案，同时揭示了有限训练数据下深度生成模型的退化行为及其缓解策略

Abstract: This study presents a conditional flow matching framework for solving physics-constrained Bayesian inverse problems. In this setting, samples from the joint distribution of inferred variables and measurements are assumed available, while explicit evaluation of the prior and likelihood densities is not required. We derive a simple and self-contained formulation of both the unconditional and conditional flow matching algorithms, tailored specifically to inverse problems. In the conditional setting, a neural network is trained to learn the velocity field of a probability flow ordinary differential equation that transports samples from a chosen source distribution directly to the posterior distribution conditioned on observed measurements. This black-box formulation accommodates nonlinear, high-dimensional, and potentially non-differentiable forward models without restrictive assumptions on the noise model. We further analyze the behavior of the learned velocity field in the regime of finite training data. Under mild architectural assumptions, we show that overtraining can induce degenerate behavior in the generated conditional distributions, including variance collapse and a phenomenon termed selective memorization, wherein generated samples concentrate around training data points associated with similar observations. A simplified theoretical analysis explains this behavior, and numerical experiments confirm it in practice. We demonstrate that standard early-stopping criteria based on monitoring test loss effectively mitigate such degeneracy. The proposed method is evaluated on several physics-based inverse problems. We investigate the impact of different choices of source distributions, including Gaussian and data-informed priors. Across these examples, conditional flow matching accurately captures complex, multimodal posterior distributions while maintaining computational efficiency.

</details>


### [988] [Data-Driven Physics Embedded Dynamics with Predictive Control and Reinforcement Learning for Quadrupeds](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14333)
*Prakrut Kotecha,Aditya Shirwatkar,Shishir Kolathaya*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出将拉格朗日神经网络(LNN)集成到RL MPC框架中，实现物理一致的动力学学习，提高四足机器人运动控制的样本效率、长期预测精度和实时规划速度


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前四足机器人运动控制方法结合MPC和RL，但面临长期预测误差累积和可解释性有限的问题，缺乏物理归纳偏置

Method: 将拉格朗日神经网络(LNN)集成到RL MPC框架中，实现物理一致的动力学学习；部署时采用逆动力学无限时域MPC方案，避免昂贵的矩阵求逆

Result: 计算效率提升高达4倍，任务性能损失最小；相比非结构化神经动力学，提高了样本效率、减少了长期预测误差、加快了实时规划；在Unitree Go1机器人上验证了实际可行性

Conclusion: LNN集成到RL MPC框架能有效解决长期预测误差累积问题，提高计算效率和物理一致性，为四足机器人运动控制提供更可靠、高效的解决方案

Abstract: State of the art quadrupedal locomotion approaches integrate Model Predictive Control (MPC) with Reinforcement Learning (RL), enabling complex motion capabilities with planning and terrain adaptive behaviors. However, they often face compounding errors over long horizons and have limited interpretability due to the absence of physical inductive biases. We address these issues by integrating Lagrangian Neural Networks (LNNs) into an RL MPC framework, enabling physically consistent dynamics learning. At deployment, our inverse dynamics infinite horizon MPC scheme avoids costly matrix inversions, improving computational efficiency by up to 4x with minimal loss of task performance. We validate our framework through multiple ablations of the proposed LNN and its variants. We show improved sample efficiency, reduced long-horizon error, and faster real time planning compared to unstructured neural dynamics. Lastly, we also test our framework on the Unitree Go1 robot to show real world viability.

</details>


### [989] [ML-EcoLyzer: Quantifying the Environmental Cost of Machine Learning Inference Across Frameworks and Hardware](https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.06694)
*Jose Marie Antonio Minoza,Rex Gregor Laylo,Christian F Villarin,Sebastian C. Ibanez*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: ML-EcoLyzer：跨框架工具，用于测量机器学习推理在CPU、GPU和加速器上的碳、能源、热力和水资源成本，引入环境可持续性评分（ESS）量化每克CO₂排放可服务的有效参数数量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器学习推理规模巨大，但其环境影响（特别是在低资源硬件上）缺乏量化。需要工具来测量推理的环境成本，促进可持续的模型选择。

Method: 开发ML-EcoLyzer跨框架工具，支持经典和现代模型，采用自适应监控和硬件感知评估。引入环境可持续性评分（ESS），在1900多个推理配置上进行评估，涵盖不同模型架构、任务模态、硬件类型和精度级别。

Result: 量化可提升ESS；大型加速器在轻量级应用中可能效率低下；即使小型模型在次优实现时也可能产生显著成本。提供了推理环境成本的广泛实证评估。

Conclusion: ML-EcoLyzer为可持续性意识模型选择设定了标准，提供了推理环境成本的全面评估工具，有助于减少机器学习的环境足迹。

Abstract: Machine learning inference occurs at a massive scale, yet its environmental impact remains poorly quantified, especially on low-resource hardware. We present ML-EcoLyzer, a cross-framework tool for measuring the carbon, energy, thermal, and water costs of inference across CPUs, consumer GPUs, and datacenter accelerators. The tool supports both classical and modern models, applying adaptive monitoring and hardware-aware evaluation.
  We introduce the Environmental Sustainability Score (ESS), which quantifies the number of effective parameters served per gram of CO$_2$ emitted. Our evaluation covers over 1,900 inference configurations, spanning diverse model architectures, task modalities (text, vision, audio, tabular), hardware types, and precision levels. These rigorous and reliable measurements demonstrate that quantization enhances ESS, huge accelerators can be inefficient for lightweight applications, and even small models may incur significant costs when implemented suboptimally. ML-EcoLyzer sets a standard for sustainability-conscious model selection and offers an extensive empirical evaluation of environmental costs during inference.

</details>


### [990] [Label Noise Cleaning for Supervised Classification via Bernoulli Random Sampling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14387)
*Yuxin Liu,Xiong Jin,Yang Han*

Main category: stat.ME

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出基于伯努利随机采样的标签噪声清洗方法，通过分析子集平均标签噪声水平的分布差异来区分干净和噪声样本，无需先验标签信息。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标签噪声（错误标签）会显著降低监督分类器的性能，需要有效的噪声清洗方法来提升模型鲁棒性。

Method: 基于伯努利随机采样生成子集，分析子集平均标签噪声水平的分布特性，建立交叉验证分类误差与标签噪声水平的线性模型，通过混合分布近似分离干净和噪声样本。

Result: 方法在模拟和真实数据集上表现出色，能够有效区分干净和噪声样本，提升分类性能。

Conclusion: 提出的标签噪声清洗方法具有理论依据，不依赖特定分类器，无需先验标签信息，在实际应用中具有良好效果。

Abstract: Label noise - incorrect labels assigned to observations - can substantially degrade the performance of supervised classifiers. This paper proposes a label noise cleaning method based on Bernoulli random sampling. We show that the mean label noise levels of subsets generated by Bernoulli random sampling containing a given observation are identically distributed for all clean observations, and identically distributed, with a different distribution, for all noisy observations. Although the mean label noise levels are not independent across observations, by introducing an independent coupling we further prove that they converge to a mixture of two well-separated distributions corresponding to clean and noisy observations. By establishing a linear model between cross-validated classification errors and label noise levels, we are able to approximate this mixture distribution and thereby separate clean and noisy observations without any prior label information. The proposed method is classifier-agnostic, theoretically justified, and demonstrates strong performance on both simulated and real datasets.

</details>


### [991] [AR-Flow VAE: A Structured Autoregressive Flow Prior Variational Autoencoder for Unsupervised Blind Source Separation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14441)
*Yuan-Hao Wei,Fu-Hao Deng,Lin-Yong Cui,Yan-Jie Sun*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出AR-Flow VAE框架，通过自回归流先验增强变分自编码器在盲源分离中的建模能力，能捕捉复杂非高斯行为和结构化依赖。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 盲源分离(BSS)需要从观测混合信号中恢复潜在源信号。传统VAE方法在建模复杂源信号特性方面存在局限，特别是对于非高斯行为和结构化依赖（如时间相关性）的捕捉能力不足。

Method: 提出AR-Flow VAE框架，为每个潜在源分配参数自适应的自回归流先验。这种结构化先验设计增强了潜在源建模的灵活性，能捕捉复杂非高斯行为和结构化依赖。不同潜在维度分配不同先验，通过异质先验约束促使潜在分量分离为不同源信号。

Result: 实验验证了所提架构在盲源分离中的有效性。该框架为未来研究AR-Flow VAE的可识别性和可解释性奠定了基础。

Conclusion: AR-Flow VAE通过自回归流先验显著增强了VAE在盲源分离中的建模能力，能有效处理复杂源信号特性，并为可识别性和可解释性研究提供了新方向。

Abstract: Blind source separation (BSS) seeks to recover latent source signals from observed mixtures. Variational autoencoders (VAEs) offer a natural perspective for this problem: the latent variables can be interpreted as source components, the encoder can be viewed as a demixing mapping from observations to sources, and the decoder can be regarded as a remixing process from inferred sources back to observations. In this work, we propose AR-Flow VAE, a novel VAE-based framework for BSS in which each latent source is endowed with a parameter-adaptive autoregressive flow prior. This prior significantly enhances the flexibility of latent source modeling, enabling the framework to capture complex non-Gaussian behaviors and structured dependencies, such as temporal correlations, that are difficult to represent with conventional priors. In addition, the structured prior design assigns distinct priors to different latent dimensions, thereby encouraging the latent components to separate into different source signals under heterogeneous prior constraints. Experimental results validate the effectiveness of the proposed architecture for blind source separation. More importantly, this work provides a foundation for future investigations into the identifiability and interpretability of AR-Flow VAE.

</details>


### [992] [Rigorous Asymptotics for First-Order Algorithms Through the Dynamical Cavity Method](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14573)
*Yatin Dandi,David Gamarnik,Francisco Pernice,Lenka Zdeborová*

Main category: cond-mat.dis-nn

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 该论文将物理中的动力学空腔方法形式化，并用于证明广义一阶方法的动力学平均场理论方程


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 动力学平均场理论(DMFT)在无序系统中描述宏观可观测量动力学，但物理学家使用的动力学空腔方法一直缺乏严格的数学形式化。现有数学形式化依赖于其他方法，如高斯条件化、路径大偏差或傅里叶分析。

Method: 作者形式化了动力学空腔方法，并利用该方法为广义一阶方法(包括梯度下降和近似消息传递等算法)提供了DMFT方程的新证明。

Result: 成功形式化了动力学空腔方法，并为广义一阶方法的动力学平均场理论方程提供了新的严格证明。

Conclusion: 该工作为动力学空腔方法提供了数学基础，扩展了DMFT在机器学习算法分析中的应用，为理解优化算法的动力学行为提供了新工具。

Abstract: Dynamical Mean Field Theory (DMFT) provides an asymptotic description of the dynamics of macroscopic observables in certain disordered systems. Originally pioneered in the context of spin glasses by Sompolinsky and Zippelius (1982), it has since been used to derive asymptotic dynamical equations for a wide range of models in physics, high-dimensional statistics and machine learning. One of the main tools used by physicists to obtain these equations is the dynamical cavity method, which has remained largely non-rigorous. In contrast, existing mathematical formalizations have relied on alternative approaches, including Gaussian conditioning, large deviations over paths, or Fourier analysis. In this work, we formalize the dynamical cavity method and use it to give a new proof of the DMFT equations for General First Order Methods, a broad class of dynamics encompassing algorithms such as Gradient Descent and Approximate Message Passing.

</details>


### [993] [Scaling Autoregressive Models for Lattice Thermodynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14695)
*Xiaochen Du,Juno Nam,Sulin Liu,Rafael Gómez-Bombarelli*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种结合任意顺序自回归模型和边缘化模型的框架，用于高效学习晶体晶格上原子构型的统计分布，相比传统采样方法在计算成本上显著降低。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统马尔可夫链蒙特卡洛采样在相变附近收敛缓慢且存在临界减速问题，现有自回归模型存在固定顺序生成、内存和训练成本高的问题，限制了在真实系统中的应用。

Method: 结合任意顺序自回归模型（可灵活生成构型）和边缘化模型（单次前向传播近似部分构型概率），使用具有晶格感知位置编码的Transformer架构，支持从小系统训练模型迁移到大系统采样。

Result: 在二维Ising模型和CuAu合金上，基于Transformer的任意顺序边缘化模型比基于多层感知机的自回归模型获得更精确的自由能，准确捕捉相变和临界行为，计算成本显著降低。

Conclusion: 该框架能够以可管理的计算成本扩展到更大系统，为材料科学中的统计分布学习提供了高效解决方案。

Abstract: Predicting how materials behave under realistic conditions requires understanding the statistical distribution of atomic configurations on crystal lattices, a problem central to alloy design, catalysis, and the study of phase transitions. Traditional Markov-chain Monte Carlo sampling suffers from slow convergence and critical slowing down near phase transitions, motivating the use of generative models that directly learn the thermodynamic distribution. Existing autoregressive models (ARMs), however, generate configurations in a fixed sequential order and incur high memory and training costs, limiting their applicability to realistic systems. Here, we develop a framework combining any-order ARMs, which generate configurations flexibly by conditioning on any known subset of lattice sites, with marginalization models (MAMs), which approximate the probability of any partial configuration in a single forward pass and substantially reduce memory requirements. This combination enables models trained on smaller lattices to be reused for sampling larger systems, while supporting expressive Transformer architectures with lattice-aware positional encodings at manageable computational cost. We demonstrate that Transformer-based any-order MAMs achieve more accurate free energies than multilayer perceptron-based ARMs on both the two-dimensional Ising model and CuAu alloys, faithfully capturing phase transitions and critical behavior. Overall, our framework scales from $10 \times 10$ to $20 \times 20$ Ising systems and from $2 \times 2 \times 4$ to $4 \times 4 \times 8$ CuAu supercells at reduced computational cost compared to conventional sampling methods.

</details>


### [994] [Design Space of Self--Consistent Electrostatic Machine Learning Interatomic Potentials](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14700)
*William J. Baldwin,Ilyes Batatia,Martin Vondrák,Johannes T. Margraf,Gábor Csányi*

Main category: physics.chem-ph

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个将静电效应纳入机器学习原子间势（MLIPs）的理论框架，将现有模型视为密度泛函理论（DFT）的粗粒度近似，并基于MACE架构实现自洽静电模型，在金属-水界面和二氧化硅空位等测试案例中验证了模型性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统MLIPs大多基于短程原子能量贡献的局部性假设，但在涉及长程静电、电荷转移或诱导极化的系统中存在固有局限性。虽然已有研究提出包含静电效应的扩展模型，但其基本假设和局限性尚未得到充分理解。

Method: 1) 建立将现有静电MLIPs视为DFT粗粒度近似的理论框架；2) 基于该形式化框架识别自洽静电MLIPs的关键设计选择；3) 使用MACE架构和共享电荷密度表示实现不同方法；4) 在金属-水界面（探测导体和绝缘体静电响应）和二氧化硅带电空位两个测试案例上进行评估。

Result: 研究结果揭示了现有方法的局限性，并证明需要更具表达力的自洽模型来解决现有模型的失败案例。通过受控比较，展示了不同静电处理方法在复杂系统上的性能差异。

Conclusion: 该工作为理解静电MLIPs提供了统一的理论框架，明确了学习量的物理意义，揭示了不同模型间的联系和等价性，并为设计更有效的自洽静电模型指明了方向。

Abstract: Machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) have become widely used tools in atomistic simulations. For much of the history of this field, the most commonly employed architectures were based on short-ranged atomic energy contributions, and the assumption of locality still persists in many modern foundation models. While this approach has enabled efficient and accurate modelling for many use cases, it poses intrinsic limitations for systems where long-range electrostatics, charge transfer, or induced polarization play a central role. A growing body of work has proposed extensions that incorporate electrostatic effects, ranging from locally predicted atomic charges to self-consistent models. While these models have demonstrated success for specific examples, their underlying assumptions, and fundamental limitations are not yet well understood. In this work, we present a framework for treating electrostatics in MLIPs by viewing existing models as coarse-grained approximations to density functional theory (DFT). This perspective makes explicit the approximations involved, clarifies the physical meaning of the learned quantities, and reveals connections and equivalences between several previously proposed models. Using this formalism, we identify key design choices that define a broader design space of self-consistent electrostatic MLIPs. We implement salient points in this space using the MACE architecture and a shared representation of the charge density, enabling controlled comparisons between different approaches. Finally, we evaluate these models on two instructive test cases: metal-water interfaces, which probe the contrasting electrostatic response of conducting and insulating systems, and charged vacancies in silicon dioxide. Our results highlight the limitations of existing approaches and demonstrate how more expressive self-consistent models are needed to resolve failures.

</details>


### [995] [Investigating the Impact of Speech Enhancement on Audio Deepfake Detection in Noisy Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14767)
*Anacin,Angela,Shruti Kshirsagar,Anderson R. Avila*

Main category: cs.SD

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 研究语音质量与音频欺骗检测系统性能之间的相关性，发现并非语音质量越高检测性能越好，MetricGAN+获得最高语音质量分数但检测性能最差，SEGAN语音质量最低但检测性能最好。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 逻辑访问攻击（音频深度伪造）对自动说话人验证系统构成严重威胁。研究者希望了解语音质量与音频欺骗检测系统性能之间的相关性，以优化检测系统的鲁棒性。

Method: 使用ASVspoof 2019挑战赛的LA数据集，在测试集中添加不同信噪比的噪声，保持训练数据不变。比较两种增强算法（SEGAN和MetricGAN+）的性能，基于PESQ和SRMR两种感知语音质量度量，评估它们对音频欺骗检测系统的影响。

Result: 出乎意料的结果：语音质量最高的MetricGAN+在音频欺骗检测任务上获得最低的EER（性能最差），而语音质量最低的SEGAN却获得最低的EER（性能最好）。这表明语音增强可能引入不需要的伪影或移除相关语音信息，从而影响下游任务性能。

Conclusion: 语音质量与音频欺骗检测性能并非正相关，语音增强算法在提高语音质量的同时可能损害检测系统的性能。在优化语音应用时需要平衡语音质量与下游任务性能。

Abstract: Logical Access (LA) attacks, also known as audio deepfake attacks, use Text-to-Speech (TTS) or Voice Conversion (VC) methods to generate spoofed speech data. This can represent a serious threat to Automatic Speaker Verification (ASV) systems, as intruders can use such attacks to bypass voice biometric security. In this study, we investigate the correlation between speech quality and the performance of audio spoofing detection systems (i.e., LA task). For that, the performance of two enhancement algorithms is evaluated based on two perceptual speech quality measures, namely Perceptual Evaluation of Speech Quality (PESQ) and Speech-to-Reverberation Modulation Ratio (SRMR), and in respect to their impact on the audio spoofing detection system. We adopted the LA dataset, provided in the ASVspoof 2019 Challenge, and corrupted its test set with different Signal-to-Noise Ratio (SNR) levels, while leaving the training data untouched. Enhancement was applied to attenuate the detrimental effects of noisy speech, and the performances of two models, Speech Enhancement Generative Adversarial Network (SEGAN) and Metric-Optimized Generative Adversarial Network Plus (MetricGAN+), were compared. Although we expect that speech quality will correlate well with speech applications' performance, it can also have as a side effect on downstream tasks if unwanted artifacts are introduced or relevant information is removed from the speech signal. Our results corroborate with this hypothesis, as we found that the enhancement algorithm leading to the highest speech quality scores, MetricGAN+, provided the lowest Equal Error Rate (EER) on the audio spoofing detection task, whereas the enhancement method with the lowest speech quality scores, SEGAN, led to the lowest EER, thus leading to better performance on the LA task.

</details>


### [996] [Preconditioned One-Step Generative Modeling for Bayesian Inverse Problems in Function Spaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14798)
*Zilan Cheng,Li-Lian Wang,Zhongjian Wang*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出一种基于一步生成传输的函数空间贝叶斯逆问题机器学习算法，使用神经算子骨干学习完全条件化摊销采样器，解决白噪声参考在函数空间极限下的不稳定性问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统贝叶斯逆问题方法（如MCMC）需要重复求解PDE，计算成本高昂。现有基于白噪声参考的生成传输方法在离散化固定时可行，但在函数空间极限下变得不稳定，需要更稳健的参考分布设计

Method: 基于Mean Flows框架，构建神经算子骨干的完全条件化摊销采样器，将参考高斯噪声映射为近似后验样本。采用先验对齐的各向异性高斯参考分布，确保传输的Lipschitz正则性。训练仅需先验样本和模拟的偏噪声观测，无需MCMC蒸馏

Result: 方法在训练后能生成64×64后验样本（约10⁻³秒），避免MCMC的重复PDE求解，同时匹配关键后验统计量。解决了白噪声参考在函数空间极限下的不稳定性问题

Conclusion: 提出了一种高效稳定的函数空间贝叶斯逆问题求解方法，通过先验对齐参考分布确保函数空间极限下的稳定性，显著加速后验采样过程，适用于PDE相关的贝叶斯问题

Abstract: We propose a machine-learning algorithm for Bayesian inverse problems in the function-space regime based on one-step generative transport. Building on the Mean Flows, we learn a fully conditional amortized sampler with a neural-operator backbone that maps a reference Gaussian noise to approximate posterior samples. We show that while white-noise references may be admissible at fixed discretization, they become incompatible with the function-space limit, leading to instability in inference for Bayesian problems arising from PDEs. To address this issue, we adopt a prior-aligned anisotropic Gaussian reference distribution and establish the Lipschitz regularity of the resulting transport. Our method is not distilled from MCMC: training relies only on prior samples and simulated partial and noisy observations. Once trained, it generates a $64\times64$ posterior sample in $\sim 10^{-3}$s, avoiding the repeated PDE solves of MCMC while matching key posterior summaries.

</details>


### [997] [A Score Filter Enhanced Data Assimilation Framework for Data-Driven Dynamical Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14863)
*Jingqiao Tang,Ryan Bausback,Feng Bao,Guannan Zhang,Phuoc-Toan Huynh*

Main category: math.DS

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于分数滤波增强的数据同化框架，用于降低机器学习模型在数据驱动动力系统预测中的预测不确定性，通过集成生成式AI的Ensemble Score Filter来改进长期预测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器学习作为动力系统预测的高效数值模型，即使有足够数据，模型不确定性仍然存在并随时间累积，导致长期预测性能下降。需要解决ML模型在长期预测中的不确定性累积问题。

Method: 提出了一种混合数据同化-训练框架，将机器学习与Ensemble Score Filter（EnSF）结合。EnSF是一种基于生成式AI的无训练扩散模型方法，用于解决高维非线性复杂系统中的数据同化问题。在训练过程中集成数据同化技术，通过融合观测信息迭代优化模型预测。

Result: 在Lorenz-96系统和Korteweg-De Vries（KdV）方程预测中，EnSF增强的ML方法能有效降低预测不确定性，改善长期预测性能。

Conclusion: 分数滤波增强的数据同化框架能够有效减少ML模型在动力系统预测中的不确定性，为数据驱动预测提供了新的混合方法。

Abstract: We introduce a score-filter-enhanced data assimilation framework designed to reduce predictive uncertainty in machine learning (ML) models for data-driven dynamical system forecasting. Machine learning serves as an efficient numerical model for predicting dynamical systems.
